settings.tagline: Handknit cotton. Soft from the very first wear.
settings.material_body: Our braided rope collars are handknit from 100% natural cotton — no synthetic fibres, no harsh dyes. Designed for dogs and cats with sensitive skin or fine coats.

settings.title: About This Collar
settings.value_1: 100% cotton braided rope with PU leather trim
settings.value_2: Stainless steel D-ring, PU leather keeper
settings.value_5: Hand wash cold, air dry flat

settings.title: Neck Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure neck, add 2cm. When between sizes, go up.
settings.table_html:
SizeNeckExample breeds
S25–35cmChihuahua, Yorkshire Terrier, small cats
M35–45cmCavoodle, French Bulldog, Beagle
L45–55cmBorder Collie, Cocker Spaniel, Dalmatian

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Wash & Care
settings.content: Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry flat — do not tumble dry or wring. Colours may soften with repeated washing. Do not bleach.

settings.name: Handknit Cotton
settings.description: 100% natural cotton, braided by hand. Gentle on sensitive skin and fine coats — zero chafing.

settings.name: Lightweight
settings.description: Weighs under 30g. They'll forget they're wearing it. Perfect for everyday.

settings.name: Stainless Hardware
settings.description: Rust-resistant D-ring holds leash clips, ID tags, and poop bag holders without corroding.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
